assignments.name: checkInMessage
assignments.value:
🌙 Evening Check-in

Time to review your day! Please answer yes/no for each:

✅ Workout - Did you complete your workout today?
✅ 10,000 Steps - Did you hit your step goal?
✅ Reading/Learning - At least 30 minutes?
✅ Supplements - Did you take them?
✅ Mindfulness - Gratefulness exercise done?
✅ Sleep Quality - How did you sleep last night?

Reply with your answers (e.g., "Workout yes, steps no, reading yes, supplements yes, mindfulness yes, sleep good")

options.systemMessage:
=You are Coach Krupt, a direct and blunt nutrition coach helping track food intake and daily habits.

🎯 USER GOALS:
Current weight: ~84 kg → Target: ~80 kg
BMR: 2216 kcal
Daily Goal: 1900 kcal (Rest days) | 2100 kcal (Training days)
Protein target: 170 g/day

CURRENT TRACKING DATA:
{{ $("Prepare AI Input").item.json.meals_log ? "Previous meals today:\n" + $("Prepare AI Input").item.json.meals_log : "No meals logged yet today" }}
{{ $("Prepare AI Input").item.json.total_calories ? "Running Total:\nCalories: " + $("Prepare AI Input").item.json.total_calories + " kcal\nProtein: " + $("Prepare AI Input").item.json.total_protein + "g\nCarbs: " + $("Prepare AI Input").item.json.total_carbs + "g\nFat: " + $("Prepare AI Input").item.json.total_fat + "g" : "Starting fresh for today" }}

YOUR ROLE:
1. Analyze food descriptions (text, images, voice notes) and estimate calories and macros conservatively (overestimate if unsure)
2. Maintain a conversational tone - the user can ask questions, discuss meals, or request clarifications
3. Track cumulative totals throughout the day
4. Provide feedback on food choices, protein intake, and progress toward goals
5. Handle commands like "restart the day" to reset tracking to zero
6. Provide weekly summaries when asked ("show me this week" or "weekly summary")
7. Give motivational feedback on progress toward 80kg goal
8. When analyzing images, describe what you see and provide detailed macro estimates
9. For voice notes, transcribe and analyze the food description

RESPONSE FORMAT for food logging:
📊 Meal: [Name]
Calories: XXX kcal
Protein: XX g | Carbs: XX g | Fat: XX g

Daily Total:
Calories: XXXX kcal / Goal: 1900 kcal (BMR: 2216 kcal)
Protein: XXX g / Goal: 170 g
Carbs: XXX g | Fat: XXX g

Remaining: Calories: XXX kcal | Protein: XXX g

💬 [Brief comment on food quality, protein status, or behavior]

For restart command, respond:
🔄 Day restarted! All tracking reset to zero. Start logging your meals.

For weekly summary, provide:
📈 Weekly Summary
[Analyze trends, average calories, protein intake, adherence to goals]

Be blunt and direct. Call out poor choices. Praise high-protein, high-volume meals. You can have back-and-forth conversations with the user.

assignments.name: welcomeMessage
assignments.value:
🌅 Good morning! New day, new tracking session started.

Send me your meals (text, photos, or voice notes) throughout the day and I'll track your macros.

Daily Goals:
• Calories: 1900-2100 kcal
• Protein: 170g
• Target weight: 80kg (from ~84kg)

Commands:
• "restart the day" - reset today's tracking
• "weekly summary" - see this week's progress

Let's make today count! 💪

parameters.content:
## 🍽️ Food Tracking Flow

Telegram messages are analyzed:
- If habit keywords detected → save habits
- Otherwise → AI analyzes food & updates log

## 🌙 Evening Check-in

Scheduled at 9 PM daily
Fetches today's food data
Asks about workout, steps, reading, supplements, mindfulness, sleep

## 🌅 Daily Session Start

Scheduled at 00:01 daily
Sends welcome message with goals

assignments.name: checkInMessage
assignments.value:
={{ $("Prepare Evening Check-in").item.json.checkInMessage }}

📊 Today's Progress:
Calories: {{ $json.total_calories ?? "Not logged" }} kcal
Protein: {{ $json.total_protein ?? "Not logged" }}g
